reason: Register MCP Config Domain v2 as the shared CLI/route surface and wire the native Control Center to the domain without reintroducing Menu Bar-only config logic.
required_change: Add `sks mcp config list|get|add|edit|duplicate|enable|disable|remove|test|login|logout|backups|restore` dispatch backed only by `src/core/mcp-config/index.ts`. Support `--scope global|project|effective`, `--stdin-json`, and `--json`; effective is read-only, project mutations require trusted canonical root plus explicit confirmation, and no flag or JSON field may accept raw secret values. Register explicit command metadata/risk: read/list/get/backups are R0, bounded health/login are R1, config mutation/restore are R2 with exact scope, and all remote/Telegram R3-style or raw-shell use is denied. Remove the retired `sks menubar mcp ...` public alias completely so it fails closed as an unknown subcommand. Wire W01 MCP Control Center actions to the canonical CLI instead of embedding a second parser. Refresh README only with behavior proven by the integration tests.
tests_requiring_change: command registry and manifest parity for mcp config
removed menubar mcp alias fails closed without redirect or deprecation residue
